name: fastapi-crud
description: FastAPI CRUD API with SQLAlchemy, SQLite, and Pydantic schemas

files.README.md:
{{stars}}{{project_name}}{{stars}}

{{app_title}} — FastAPI CRUD API generated by virgo.

## Quickstart

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
python -m {{project_name}}.main
```

## API Endpoints

- `GET /` — Health check
- `GET /items` — List all items
- `POST /items` — Create item
- `GET /items/{id}` — Get item by ID
- `PUT /items/{id}` — Update item
- `DELETE /items/{id}` — Delete item

## Project Structure

```
{{project_name}}/
├── main.py          # Entry point, FastAPI app
├── models.py        # SQLAlchemy ORM models
├── schemas.py       # Pydantic request/response schemas
├── database.py     # Database engine and session
└── routers/
    ├── __init__.py
    └── items.py       # CRUD routes
```
files.{{project_name}}/database.py:
"""
Database engine and session factory.
"""

from sqlalchemy import create_engine
from sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase, sessionmaker

DATABASE_URL = "sqlite:///./{{project_name}}.db"

engine = create_engine(DATABASE_URL, connect_args={"check_same_thread": False})
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(engine)


class Base(DeclarativeBase):
    pass


def get_db():
    """Yield a database session for FastAPI dependency injection."""
    db = SessionLocal()
    try:
        yield db
    finally:
        db.close()
files.{{project_name}}/models.py:
"""
SQLAlchemy ORM models.
"""

from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, DateTime, func
from {{project_name}}.database import Base


class Item(Base):
    __tablename__ = "items"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    description = Column(String, default="")
    created_at = Column(DateTime, server_default=func.now())
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, onupdate=func.now())
files.{{project_name}}/schemas.py:
"""
Pydantic schemas for request/response validation.
"""

from datetime import datetime
from pydantic import BaseModel


class ItemBase(BaseModel):
    name: str
    description: str = ""


class ItemCreate(ItemBase):
    pass


class ItemUpdate(BaseModel):
    name: str | None = None
    description: str | None = None


class ItemResponse(ItemBase):
    id: int
    created_at: datetime
    updated_at: datetime | None = None

    model_config = {"from_attributes": True}
files.{{project_name}}/main.py:
"""
{{app_title}} — FastAPI application entry point.
"""

from fastapi import FastAPI
from {{project_name}}.database import Base, engine
from {{project_name}}.routers.items import router as items_router

Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)

app = FastAPI(title="{{app_title}}", version="0.1.0")
app.include_router(items_router)


@app.get("/")
def health():
    return {"status": "ok", "app": "{{app_title}}"}
files.{{project_name}}/tests/test_items.py:
"""
Tests for item CRUD endpoints.
"""

from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from {{project_name}}.main import app

client = TestClient(app)


def test_health():
    resp = client.get("/")
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert resp.json()["status"] == "ok"


def test_create_item():
    resp = client.post("/items/", json={"name": "test", "description": "desc"})
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    data = resp.json()
    assert data["name"] == "test"
    assert "id" in data


def test_list_items():
    resp = client.get("/items/")
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert isinstance(resp.json(), list)


def test_get_nonexistent_item():
    resp = client.get("/items/9999")
    assert resp.status_code == 404
